action.reasoning: Observation: LoRA training failed immediately because LogCallback did not subclass TrainerCallback. Current train.py also has fragile multimodal collation, and predict/model must reliably load LoRA adapters while resolving the packaged base model. Analysis: fix the callback integration, make collation compatible with Qwen image_grid_thw/pixel_values, and ensure checkpoints can reference the existing packaged Qwen base without duplicating it. Decision: rewrite train.py and model.py robustly, train a 1-epoch LoRA on 1000 samples, then submit the adapter checkpoint for evaluation.
action.command: python -m py_compile model.py predict.py train.py && python train.py --epochs 1 --max_samples 1000 --output_dir checkpoints/qwen_lora_1k --batch_size 1 --grad_accum 16 --lr 1e-4
